caption: A person with short dark hair and a beard is visible in a small webcam overlay in the upper right corner of a screen share, wearing a dark shirt. The main screen displays a digital workspace containing several open documents and a mind map. One document, titled "Rural Community Food System," features a section labeled "Introduction" and asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" and lists "Session Videos" with various dates. A complex mind map with green nodes and connecting lines is visible behind the text. Another document is titled "1IR Ecological Considerations & Community Health." Across the frames, the user navigates the workspace, shifting the focus from the "Rural Community Food System" document to the "1IR Ecological Considerations & Community Health" document. The person in the webcam remains mostly stationary, facing the camera while managing the on-screen content.
